backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that FinalProposalSection.tsx was updated to redirect the YES button to WhatsApp with a pre-filled message, replacing the previous celebration overlay.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to their one-line descriptions, serving as a quick reference for the project's component and style structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Playfair Display and Poppins fonts from Google Fonts and mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page romantic proposal layout by composing all section and UI components in order.
frontend/src/components/FinalProposalSec: Final proposal section featuring a YES button that opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled 'I said YES ❤️' message to +918810471387, and a THINK AGAIN button that dodges away on hover/click using randomized transforms.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHearts.t: Background decoration component that renders 18 SVG hearts with randomized sizes, positions, and floatUp animations continuously rising across the viewport.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Romantic footer displaying 'Made with Love by Ankit', pulsing heart decorations, a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking, and a dynamic copyright year.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a sunset background image, animated gradient overlay, CSS sparkle icons, a glowing 'YOUR ANKIT?' heading, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the journey section.
frontend/src/components/MusicToggle.tsx: Fixed-position music toggle button that plays/pauses a looping background audio track, switching between Music and VolumeX icons with glowing romantic styling.
frontend/src/components/OurJourneySectio: Renders a timeline section displaying five relationship memories as alternating left/right cards with scroll-triggered fade-in animations and a vertical center line.
frontend/src/components/SecretMessageSec: Renders a password-protected section that reveals a personal love letter when the correct password ('Meolove') is entered, with idle/wrong/revealed states.
frontend/src/components/WhyYouAreSpecial: Displays a grid of heart-shaped floating cards, each representing a personal trait, with scroll-triggered fade-in and hover glow effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a romantic pastel design system with Tailwind base layers, CSS custom properties, and keyframe animations (heartPulse, floatBob, glowPulse, etc.).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Poppins), oklch-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a romantic proposal website where the YES button redirects to WhatsApp with a pre-filled message, replacing the previous confetti celebration overlay.
